title: Conect Monday.com with my own app
excerpt: “Hello, good morning everyone. I have an internal app for controlling fixed tasks throughout the month, but it doesn’t have the same visualization capabilities as Monday.com. Is it possible to integrate it to pull inform…

posts.author: YagoMachado (Yago Machado)
posts.cookedHtml: “Hello, good morning everyone. I have an internal app for controlling fixed tasks throughout the month, but it doesn’t have the same visualization capabilities as Monday.com. Is it possible to integrate it to pull information from my app into Monday?”
